title: Progress UX (calibrated customer progress)
description: Six-stage calibrated customer progress display on /quote (client-timed, telemetry-paced) with a ProgressDriver seam for future server-streamed progress.
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). OPERION_PROGRESS_UX is OFF ⇒ the static "Analyzing…" view is served (customer-facing behavior unchanged).
Set OPERION_PROGRESS_UX=OFF (reverts to the static analyzing view).
compatibilityNotes: Customer-facing UI — downstream branding (copy, colors, brand red) MUST be preserved during adaptation.
Pure state machine is reusable; only CalibratedProgress.tsx + page.tsx wiring are branding-coupled.

history.note: Landed in the Supercharged parity release PR #8 (da5fdc8 progress-ux backend); bundle re-verified green (tsc/462 tests/117 ai/regression/build, flags OFF) and merged as a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac. Discovery→merged recorded as a bundled reconciliation transition (the parity foundation was validated and merged as one unit).

verification.summary: PR #8 bundle re-verified against head da5fdc8: tsc 0 errors; eslint changed-files 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite 462/462; test:ai 117/117; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ compiled successfully; all new flags default OFF (flag-off = byte-identical). GitHub Vercel + regression green on merge commit a8e0584.
